summary: Stammkunde (registered player) feature complete. All 21 backend tests pass. Frontend Kiosk SetupScreen: game type selection, virtual keyboard, PIN modal for registered players, registration flow with PIN confirmation - all working. Fixed PinPad state reset bug during testing.
passed_tests: POST /api/players/check - returns exists=false for new names
POST /api/players/register - creates new player with qr_token
POST /api/players/qr-login - success with valid token from registration
GET /api/stats/leaderboard - returns is_registered and player_id fields
Guest to registered upgrade preserves stats
Frontend: WEITER button appears after game selection
Frontend: Virtual keyboard for player names
Frontend: PIN modal appears for registered player names
Frontend: PIN login success shows 'Stammkunde' badge (green)
Frontend: Wrong PIN shows 'Falscher PIN' error in red
Frontend: Registration button (UserPlus icon) for guest names
Frontend: Registration modal with 2-step PIN confirmation
Frontend: PIN mismatch shows 'PINs stimmen nicht überein' error
Frontend: Registration success shows toast and verified badge
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed PinPad component: Added useEffect to reset PIN state when title changes (prevents PIN accumulation bug during registration flow)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stammkunde feature fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/players/check (nickname lookup), POST /api/players/register (new/upgrade), POST /api/players/pin-login, POST /api/players/qr-login, GET /api/players/registered. Frontend flow: Kiosk SetupScreen → game type → players step → virtual keyboard → PIN modal for registered or UserPlus button for guests. PinPad component uses useEffect to reset internal pin state when title changes. Toast messages in German. Board BOARD-1 has 3 credits remaining.

rca_of_fixed_issue.issue: PinPad PIN accumulation bug during registration
rca_of_fixed_issue.root_cause: PinPad component had internal useState for PIN that wasn't reset when switching from first PIN entry to confirmation step. Digits accumulated (8 instead of 4) causing false PIN mismatch errors.
rca_of_fixed_issue.fix: Added useEffect(() => setPin(''), [title]) to reset PIN state when modal title changes (e.g., 'Stammkunde werden' → 'PIN bestätigen')
